items.title: t-SNE
items.description: t-SNE produces 2D/3D coordinates emphasizing local neighborhoods; this topic covers how to plot and interpret those coordinates—not the t-SNE objective or perplexity tuning theory.

items.title: UMAP
items.description: UMAP yields low-dimensional layouts balancing local and global structure; apply the plotting, coloring, and interpretation practices here after running UMAP.

items.title: PCA
items.description: The first two or three PCA components provide fast linear baseline coordinates for embedding scatter plots when non-linear methods are not yet needed.

items.title: Clustering
items.description: Embedding plots help hypothesize cluster count and separation before or after running clustering on features or coordinates; visual density guides k selection and sanity checks.

items.title: Confusion matrix
items.description: Coloring embeddings by true vs predicted labels (or marking errors) gives spatial context to off-diagonal confusion-matrix cells—where which class pairs collide.
